name: Chicken and Dumpling Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, sauté onion, celery, and garlic in butter until tender.
2. Add flour, sugar, salt, dried basil, and pepper to the pan; stir well.
3. Gradually add chicken broth, stirring constantly until the mixture comes to a boil.
4. Cook for 1 minute on medium heat, then reduce heat.
5. Stir in frozen green peas and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
6. Fold in cubed cooked chicken and transfer the mixture to a greased 13x9 inch baking dish.
7. For dumplings, mix biscuit mix with dried basil in a bowl.
8. In another bowl, combine milk and stir until moistened.
9. Drop spoonfuls of the dough mixture onto the casserole (12 dumplings).
10. Cover the baking dish with foil.
11. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
12. Remove the cover and bake for an additional 10 minutes or until the dumplings are cooked through.
Serves 6 to 8 people.
